tool_args.label: State Budget Funding for MTA - $1.1B Annually

payload.claim_text: The State budget includes $1.1 billion annually to MTA with an increase to the top rate of the Payroll Mobility Tax for the largest businesses in New York City from 0.34% to 0.60%.
payload.subject: New York State Budget
payload.description: State budget agreement providing $1.1B annually in new revenues dedicated to MTA

evidence_refs.source_quote: State budget includes $1.1 billion annually to MTA with an increase to the top rate of the Payroll Mobility Tax

tool_args.label: State Funding to Reduce Fare Increase

payload.claim_text: State budget includes $65 million, reducing the proposed fare increase from 5.5% to 4%
payload.subject: New York State Budget
payload.description: State funding to reduce proposed fare increase

evidence_refs.source_quote: $65 million, reducing the proposed fare increase from 5.5% to 4%
